stereotype: «Engine» — pure, deterministic; encapsulates HandOffPolicy volatility; Strategy host; imports no Temporal
volatility: HandOffPolicy (volatilities.md axis 2 — same customer over time) — at any given moment different customers have chosen different splits of human vs automated work along the Method's architect/senior/junior hand-off. Who fills the worker role for a given activity does, not the workflow shape.

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function; no Activity wrapper; no Temporal
ops.note: Returns the worker class (AIWorker / HumanSeniorWorker / HumanJuniorWorker / ArchitectOnly) the policy casts onto the given construction activity at dispatch time.

fields.name: Activity
fields.note: ConstructionActivity struct { ActivityID ActivityID; Type ActivityType; Component ComponentID; Role Role; /+sensitivity/risk-bucket fields/ }

fields.name: Policy
fields.note: HandOffPolicy struct { Mode HandOffMode; /+per-activity-type/sensitivity casting overrides/ } — axis-2 Strategy parameter; casting rule is package-internal

fields.name: WorkerClass
fields.note: WorkerClass int — AIWorker | HumanSeniorWorker | HumanJuniorWorker | ArchitectOnly; Engine-facing enum; new classes added as registered strategies

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ContractMisuse (nil activity/policy; activity missing type/role policy keys on) | UnknownWorkerClass (policy casts a class the running build lacks; no silent fallback) | InternalInvariant (strategy returned out-of-range class)

dataContracts: ConstructionActivity struct { ActivityID, Type ActivityType, Component ComponentID, Role Role /+ sensitivity/risk-bucket fields/ }
HandOffPolicy struct { Mode HandOffMode, /+ per-activity-type/sensitivity casting overrides/ } // axis-2 Strategy parameter; casting rule is package-internal
WorkerClass int // AIWorker | HumanSeniorWorker | HumanJuniorWorker | ArchitectOnly — Engine-facing enum; new classes added as registered strategies (OQ-3 ratified)
errorModel: framework-go/engine.Error — ContractMisuse (nil activity; nil policy; activity missing type/role the policy keys on) | UnknownWorkerClass (policy casts a class the running build lacks; no silent fallback) | InternalInvariant (strategy returned a class outside registered set). No InvalidInput (no parse step). No retryable flag; all errors are programmer errors.
idempotency: Trivially idempotent — pure function; identical (activity, policy) → identical WorkerClass; no side effects; no idempotencyKey.

revisions.summary: New contract for existing Engine; 1-op justified against single-decision volatility and DSL edge label; reviewEngine confirmed orthogonal sibling; Takeover re-cast hypothesis pre-dismissed; OQ-1..5 drafted.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE: 6/9 PASS, 2 WAIVED (2a+2b — 1-op endorsed). Variance/Takeover re-cast hypothesis investigated and dismissed (interventionEngine owns DecideOnVariance; no interventionEngine→handOffEngine edge). OQ-1 waiver endorsed; OQ-2 ArchitectOnly returned as normal class; OQ-3 WorkerClass as Engine-facing enum ratified; OQ-4 UnknownWorkerClass kept (structural analogue of ErrUnknownInfrastructure); OQ-5 signature ratified field-shape construction-refinable. Three reviewer-mayAmend clarifications: removed artifactValidationEngine as 1-op precedent (re-cut to 5 verbs 2026-05-26). 4 non-blocking follow-ups to C-HE.
